nodes.name: Fetch Client Pull History
nodes.notes: Adjust clientId path to match Twenty webhook payload shape (may be record.client.id).

parameters.content:
## AUTO-08

Recalculates reliability score (1–10) when pull closes.

**Refine scoring** in Calculate Score node to include:
- On-time return rate (returnDate vs actual)
- Damage/loss flags
- Credit given rate
